blended.narrative: Ragged Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
